title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Describe a typical day in your life.
Do you think it's important to have a regular routine? Why?
Are you a morning person or do you prefer evenings? Why?
What habits have you developed recently that you find helpful?
How do you usually wind down after a stressful day?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think having a routine is essential for productivity?
Are you better at planning ahead or dealing with unexpected situations?
What do you think is the best way to manage your time effectively?
